# LibreTV archived-upstream outreach adjustment

This patch documents the real GitHub constraint discovered after the outreach baseline: the archived upstream repository is read-only, so upstream issue replies cannot be posted.

## Included

- Clarifies that outreach should fall back to repository metadata, releases, and this repository's Discussions when upstream issues are locked by archive status.
- Updates the README and outreach runbook so maintainers do not repeatedly retry blocked upstream comments.
- Keeps the repository-only policy: no public deployment URLs, no public streaming service positioning.

## Links

- Repository: <https://github.com/wxst/LibreTV>
- Migration FAQ: <https://github.com/wxst/LibreTV/blob/main/MIGRATION.md>
- Migration discussion: <https://github.com/wxst/LibreTV/discussions/9>
